title: Chicken breyani
excerpt: I didn't know Pieter at all but I had a need to cook alongside the man. He then asked for Breyani. My nerves were a bit on edge, but it was all for nothing. He was hooked on the food.
html: I didn't know Pieter at all but I had a need to cook alongside the man. He then asked for Breyani. My nerves were a bit on edge, but it was all for nothing. He was hooked on the food.

ingredientGroups.title: Chicken
items: 1 kg chicken fillets, cut into portions

ingredientGroups.title: Additional
items: 1 onion, cut into rings to fry with the chicken
2 peeled potatoes cut into quarters and parboiled
2 onions, cut into rings and fried until golden brown and crisp

directionGroups.title: Rice
steps: Cook everything together until the rice is just soft.

directionGroups.title: Chicken
steps: Mix all the ingredients and marinate the chicken overnight, or for at least 1 hour.

directionGroups.title: Bringing it all together
steps: Fry one onion in the oil.
Add the star anise, halved chillies and bay leaves and fry briefly.
Add the chicken with the marinade and fry lightly for 5 minutes.
Add the tin of lentils and the potatoes to the chicken.
Pour the rice over the chicken.
Add the chicken stock and place in the oven for 40 minutes.
Finish off with the crispy onions, boiled eggs and fresh coriander.
